original_prompt: 帮我在建筑上生成Jade Trau的图标
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
A monumental, high-fashion architectural scene featuring a gigantic, hyper-realistic beaded bracelet hovering or resting elegantly atop a modern minimalist concrete building. The bracelet, following the [Subject Lock], is composed of glossy black obsidian beads, a central golden tiger's eye bead, and two matte black carved Pixiu beads. The textures—glassy sheen, chatoyant amber glow, and satin carving—are rendered in 8K resolution. The building has a sleek, brutalist aesthetic with smooth grey surfaces and glass panels reflecting the sky.

[Text & UI Layout]
Large, illuminated 3D channel letters installed on the building facade reading "JADE TRAU". The text is in a sophisticated, serif font, glowing with a soft warm white light. Below it, a smaller tagline reads "Timeless Charm" in a clean sans-serif font. The layout is balanced, with the bracelet acting as an architectural art installation on the roof, and the text centered on the upper third of the building wall.
layout_logic: The composition should use a low-angle perspective to make the building and the bracelet look monumental. The bracelet sits on the 'roof' or upper ledge as a giant art piece. The text 'JADE TRAU' should be placed on the largest blank wall surface, ensuring high contrast and legibility, acting as the primary signage.
